summary: Russian operators of the "Rubikon" Center conducted strikes in Donbas, the Sumy direction, and near Krasny Liman on March 3 and 4, destroying 191 and 103 targets respectively, including Ukrainian personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and a 2S1 Gvozdika self-propelled artillery system. The center has published over 19,000 episodes of enemy target destruction, with 34.7% being unmanned systems, 16.5% communication and observation systems, 15.9% ground protected targets, 13.4% unarmored vehicles, and 9.6% armored vehicles. Ukrainian forces are using a Chinese PTS-303 rotating antenna system (3-5 thousand hryvnias) for FPV drone and video interceptor production, capable of vertical and horizontal rotation on 24/220 volts. Ukrainian forces are also developing camouflaged antenna systems using plastic mesh to conceal RERs, RERs, and UAV control stations from aerial reconnaissance. An FPV drone narrowly missed a Russian Mi-8 helicopter.
